Battle Bracket
Reader engagement drives this bracket competition, held every March.
Survey: Young active-duty troops outpace civilian peers in home-buying market
The average active-duty home-buyer is six years younger than his (or her) civilian counterpart, one study says.
8 years ago
Clash of Characters: Gunny Hartman takes title, R. Lee Ermey thanks his fans
The drill instructor that made "Full Metal Jacket" famous has claimed this year's Battle Bracket crown.
9 years ago
